title: When Was the Last Time
questions: When was the last time you said no?
When was the last time you hurt yourself?
When was the last time you thought to yourself, 'never again'?
When was the last time you felt on top of the world?
When was the last time you tidied your room / your desk?
When was the last time someone shouted at you?
When was the last time you had a problem with your computer?
When was the last time you had a perfect day?
When was the last time you said sorry?
When was the last time you bumped into an old friend?
When was the last time you felt really, really angry?
When was the last time you forgot to do something?
When was the last time you had a fight with someone?
When was the last time someone did something that made you very happy?
When was the last time you felt positive about Earth's future?
When was the last time you got a real letter (one in an envelope with a stamp on it) written by a real person?
When was the last time you received some bad news?
When was the last time you changed your plans for your life?
When was the last time you were lost?
